raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 55,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch ſtahweja / un ſtwehtija wiſſu Iſraëta Draudſi
ar ſtipru Balsi/ un tazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 56,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Slawehts irr tas KUNGS/ ko ſas ſaweem Iſraëta Laudim
Duſteſchann dewis pehz wiſſu / ko wiꞥſch irr runnajs/ ne weens
Wahrs irr pee Semnes krittis no wiſſeem winna labbein Wahr-
deem/ ko wiꞥſch zaur fawu Kal-
pu Mohſu runnajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 57,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid tas KUNGS muh-
fu Deews ar mums irr/ ittin ka
tas ar muhſeem Tehweem bijs.
Lai tas muhs ne atſtahj/ nei fa-
wu Rohku no mums atranj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 58,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Laid tas muhſu Sirdis pee ſewim greesch/ ka mehs eekſch
wiſſeem winna Zetteem ſtaqqa-
jam/ turređami winna Bauslus/
un winna Likkumis/ un winna Teefas/ ko wiꞥſch muhſeem Teh-
weem pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 59,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un lui ſchee Wahrdi/ ar keem,
ko es ta KUNGA Waigu pee-
lubdsis/ tuwu pee ta KUNGA muhſu Deewa irr/ Deend un
Nakti/ ka wiꞥſch to Teefu nets ſawain Kalpam/ un ſaweem I-
ſraëta Landun / iſkatru fawa Lattâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 60,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka wiſſi Pafaules Lan-
dis atſibſt/ ka tas KUNGS
par Deewu irr/ unzits ne weens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 61,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un lai juhſu Sirds goh-
diga irr ar to KUNGU muhſu
Deewu / ka juhs ſtaigajat win-
na Likkumis/ un turrat winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 62,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniſch un wiſſ
Iſraëls ar wiſſu uppureja
preekſch to KUNGU Uppurus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 63,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Salamans uppure-
ja Pateifschanas- Uppurus/ ko
wiſch tam KUNGAM uppu-
reja/ diwideſmits un divituhſto-
chus Wehrſchus/ un ſints un di-
wideſmits tuhſtoschas Awis.
Tä eeswehtija tas Kehniſch ar
wiſſeem Iſraëta Behrneem to Nammu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 64,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tai Deena ſwehtija tas
Kehniſch ta Pagalmja Widdu/
kas preekſch ta KUNGA Nam-
mu bija / jo wiſch iſtaisija tur
to Dedſamo-Uppuri / un Ehd-
amo-Uppuri/ un Pateifschanas-
Uppuren Tankus. Jo tas War-
ra Altaris/ kas preekſch ta KUN-
GA Waiga ſtahweja/ bija wiſ-
fai maſs preekſch to Dedſamo-
Uppuri/ un Ehdamo-Uppuri/ un
Pateifschanas-Uppuru Tau-
keem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 65,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tanni Laikâ turreja ar-
ridsan Salamans Swchtkus /
ar wiſſu Iſraëlu / weena leela
Draudse / no Eemata Kohbe-
schas/lihds Egiptes Uppei/preekſch
to KUNGU muhſu Deewu/ ſep-
tinas Deenas/ un atkaž ſepți-
nas Deenas / tahs padarrija
tſchetrpadeſmits Deenas/ astotä
Deena atlaide wiſch tohs Lau-
dis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 66,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee ſwehtija to Kehnt-
nu / un gahje us ſaweem Dſily-
woltceim preezadamees/ un ar
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
